zh.lifeSummary: 當William Keith of Galston, 2nd Lord Marischal, Sheriff of Kincardine於1315年出生在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾時，他的父親Sir Edward de Keith29歲，母親ISABELLA  Synton Fraser30歲。他於1351年5月3日之前與Margaret Fraser of Touchfraser and Cowie在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾登諾塔結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於從1407年到1413年在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾斯同哈文，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾加爾斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Keith of Galston, 2nd Lord Marischal, Sheriff of Kincardine于1315年出生在英国苏格兰金加迪爾时，他的父亲Sir Edward de Keith29岁，母亲ISABELLA  Synton Fraser30岁。他于1351年5月3日之前与Margaret Fraser of Touchfraser and Cowie在英国苏格兰金加迪爾登諾塔结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于从1407年到1413年在英国苏格兰金加迪爾斯同哈文，埋葬在英国苏格兰艾斯爾加爾斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Keith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the lands of Keith in East Lothian. The placename is derived from British Celtic cait- ‘wood’. In the 17th century numerous bearers of this name settled in Ulster.
German: nickname from Middle High German kīt ‘sprout, offspring’.

History: George Keith (c. 1638–1716), born at Peterhead, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, came to NJ in or before 1685. In 1689 he settled in Philadelphia, where he became headmaster of the school now called the William Penn Charter School. He came into sharp collision with the Quaker leaders in PA and formed a separatist party known as the Christian Quakers, popularly known as ‘Keithians’.

variants.name: Kight
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Kite  .

variants.name: Keath
meanings: Scottish and English (mainly Cambridgeshire): variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Kite
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English kete, kyte ‘kite’ (the bird of prey), perhaps a nickname for a rapacious person.
English: habitational name from one or more of the minor places with names deriving from Old English cȳte, cyte ‘cottage, hut, shed’, such as Kite Farm in Swalecliffe (Kent).

variants.name: Keeth
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Keitt
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German   Keith   2.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Keith of Galston, 2nd Lord Marischal, Sheriff of Kincardine was born in 1315, in Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Edward de Keith, was 29 and his mother, ISABELLA  Synton Fraser, was 30. He married Margaret Fraser of Touchfraser and Cowie before 3 May 1351, in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died from 1407 to 1413, in Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, and was buried in Galston, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Keith of Galston, 2nd Lord Marischal, Sheriff of Kincardine est né en 1315, à Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Edward de Keith, avait 29 ans et sa mère, ISABELLA  Synton Fraser, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Fraser of Touchfraser and Cowie avant 3 mai 1351, à Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé du 1407 au 1413, à Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Galston, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Keith of Galston, 2nd Lord Marischal, Sheriff of Kincardine 1315 in Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edward de Keith 29 und seine Mutter ISABELLA  Synton Fraser 30. Er hat vor 3. Mai 1351 in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Margaret Fraser of Touchfraser and Cowie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb von 1407 bis 1413 in Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Galston, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Keith of Galston, 2nd Lord Marischal, Sheriff of Kincardine è nato il nel 1315 nel Kincardineshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Edward de Keith, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, ISABELLA  Synton Fraser, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Fraser of Touchfraser and Cowie prima del 3 maggio 1351, nel Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì da 1407 a 1413, nel Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Galston, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Keith of Galston, 2nd Lord Marischal, Sheriff of Kincardineが1315年にイギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Edward de Keithは29歳，母ISABELLA  Synton Fraserは30歳であった。1351年5月3日以前にイギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアダノッタルでMargaret Fraser of Touchfraser and Cowieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼はから1407年まで1413年にイギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアストーネヘイベンで死去し，イギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアガルストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Keith of Galston, 2nd Lord Marischal, Sheriff of Kincardine(이)가 1315년 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edward de Keith(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 ISABELLA  Synton Fraser(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1351년 5월 3일 이전 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르 던타르에서 Margaret Fraser of Touchfraser and Cowie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1407년 부터 1413년 까지 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르 스톤하븐에서 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 갈스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Keith of Galston, 2nd Lord Marischal, Sheriff of Kincardine nasceu em 1315, em Kincardineshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Edward de Keith, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, ISABELLA  Synton Fraser, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Fraser of Touchfraser and Cowie antes 3 de maio de 1351, em Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu de 1407 a 1413, em Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Galston, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Keith of Galston, 2nd Lord Marischal, Sheriff of Kincardine родился в 1315 г. в местности кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Edward de Keith было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали ISABELLA  Synton Fraser, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Fraser of Touchfraser and Cowie перед 3 май 1351 г. в местности дунноттар, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер с 1407 по 1413 в местности стоунэавен, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности галстон, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

sm.from 1407 to 1413: mai le 1407 e o'o I le 1413

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Keith of Galston, 2nd Lord Marischal, Sheriff of Kincardine nació en 1315, en Kincardineshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Edward de Keith, tenía 29 años y su mamá, ISABELLA  Synton Fraser, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Margaret Fraser of Touchfraser and Cowie antes de 3 de mayo de 1351, en Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió desde 1407 hasta 1413, en Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Galston, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
